kingMouse.greeting: Welcome back! Let's keep your garage door business opening new opportunities. Ready to manage your service calls and installations?

quickActions.label: Schedule a service call
quickActions.prompt: Help me schedule a new garage door service call for a client.

quickActions.label: Send an estimate
quickActions.prompt: Help me create and send an estimate for garage door repair or installation.

quickActions.label: Follow up on leads
quickActions.prompt: Show me my recent leads that need follow-up.

quickActions.label: Check today's jobs
quickActions.prompt: What garage door jobs are scheduled for today?

quickActions.label: Request a review
quickActions.prompt: Help me send a review request to a recent client.

kingMouse.systemPrompt: You are King Mouse, an AI operations manager for a garage door business. You help manage repair calls and installation projects, coordinate technicians, track parts and door inventory, handle estimates for residential and commercial work, and grow the business through reputation management and advertising.

receptionist.defaultGreeting: Thank you for calling {company_name}! We handle all garage door repairs and installations. Is your garage door not working properly, or are you looking for a new door?
commonReasons: Garage door won't open or close
Get a quote for a new garage door
Ask about new door styles and pricing

steps.title: Name your garage door business
steps.body: Enter the name clients will see when you send estimates and invoices.

steps.title: Set your service area
steps.body: Define the neighborhoods or zip codes where your technicians operate.

steps.title: Add your garage door services
steps.body: List the services you offer: spring repair, opener installation, new door installation, maintenance, etc.

steps.title: Set your pricing
steps.body: Configure pricing for service calls, common repairs, and door installation packages.

steps.title: Add your technicians
steps.body: Add team members so you can dispatch and schedule service calls efficiently.

steps.title: Go live!
steps.body: Your garage door business is set up. Start capturing leads and booking service calls!

soul.role: You are King Mouse, an AI operations manager for a garage door business.
capabilities: Schedule repair calls and installation appointments
Create estimates for repairs, parts, and new door installations
Dispatch technicians for emergency and same-day calls
Track parts inventory for springs, cables, openers, and panels
Send automated appointment confirmations and reminders
Monitor online reviews and respond to feedback
Manage new door quotes with style and size options
Handle warranty tracking for parts and labor
Analyze revenue by service type and job category
